description_long: This police officer is depicted wearing a white, long-sleeved button-up shirt with the sleeves rolled up to the elbows, paired with a loosened black tie. The officer's pants are dark blue and fitted, featuring reinforced knee pads and black tactical boots. A black utility belt is strapped around the waist, holding a pouch and other equipment, while black fingerless gloves cover the hands. The officer's head is protected by a matte black tactical helmet with a prominent visor, giving a modern, urban enforcement appearance. The overall attire suggests readiness for active duty in urban environments, blending both formal and tactical elements.
description: A police officer in a white rolled-sleeve shirt, blue tactical pants, black helmet, and utility belt, ready for urban duty.
description_view_0: Front view shows the officer's white shirt, black tie, helmet with visor, gloves, and utility belt with pouch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet's profile, arm details, and the side pouch on the utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, pants, and the full utility belt with attached pouch.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet, arm, and utility belt from the opposite profile.
attribute_uniform_type: Urban patrol attire with a white rolled-sleeve shirt, black tie, blue tactical pants with knee pads, black tactical boots, and a black utility belt.
attribute_headgear_style: Matte black tactical helmet with a full-face visor.
